message:
Add env field to verified_installer schema and improve install summaries

Extend the manifest schema with an optional env array for KEY=value
environment variable assignments passed to upstream installer runners.
Add regex validation rejecting malformed entries. Update VerifiedInstaller
TypeScript interface and code generator to thread env through
buildVerifiedInstallerPipe and generateVerifiedInstallerSnippet.

Improve summarizeShellBlock() to skip comment-only and variable-assignment
lines, producing more actionable dry-run and error messages in generated
install scripts. Tests for env parsing, validation, managed service
generation, RU env passthrough, and comment-skipping summaries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -173,6 +173,16 @@ export const ModuleSchema = z
             'Tool name must be lowercase alphanumeric with underscores (e.g., "bun", "claude", "mcp_agent_mail")'
           ),
         runner: VerifiedInstallerRunnerSchema,
+        env: z
+          .array(
+            z
+              .string()
+              .regex(
+                /^[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*=.*$/,
+                'Verified installer env entries must be KEY=value assignments'
+              )
+          )
+          .default([]),
         args: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
         // Run installer in detached tmux session (prevents blocking for long-running services)
         run_in_tmux: z.boolean().default(false),
